name: Dog Tired Tee
headline: Because you're exhausted and your dog won't let you sleep.
blurb: A relatable design for dog parents who love their chaotic pups despite running on fumes and cold coffee.
story: We made this for the 3 a.m. bathroom break crew and the Sunday morning zoomies survivors. Your dog gives you purpose, joy, and absolutely zero rest. Wear it like the badge of honor it is.
recraft_prompt: A worn-out cartoon dog slumped in a comfortable armchair wearing pajamas, one paw holding a steaming coffee mug, eyes half-closed with dark circles, surrounded by small floating Z's and scattered dog toys. Bold retro vector style with warm muted tones. Text reads 'DOG TIRED' in friendly rounded sans-serif lettering above the dog. Centered, isolated on a plain white background, print-ready apparel graphic.

social.tt_hook: if your dog owns your sleep schedule, this tee gets it 😴
social.pin_title: Dog Tired Funny Dog Mom Tee | Exhausted Dog Lover Shirt
social.pin_keywords: dog mom shirt, dog lover tee, funny dog apparel, rescue dog humor, dog dad gift
social.audience: Sleep-deprived dog parents who laugh at their own exhaustion
